# PUT /api/users/{userId}

**Update user**

Updates user information (username, password, enabled status). All fields are optional.

Operation ID: `update`

**Authentication**

Required (Bearer Authentication).

## Path Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| userId | integer | Yes |  |

## Request Body

Schema: `UpdateUserRequest` (application/json)

| Field | Type | Required | Constraints | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| username | string | No | maxLength: 80; minLength: 3 |  |
| password | string | No | maxLength: 120; minLength: 6 |  |
| enabled | boolean | No |  |  |
| roleNames | array<string> | No |  |  |

| createdAt | string (date-time) | No |  |  |
| createdBy | string | No |  |  |
| updatedAt | string (date-time) | No |  |  |
| updatedBy | string | No |  |  |
